name: LaunchBox Data XML

media.path_style: LaunchBox media category folders under platform names

ai_operations: identify games by developer/publisher for targeted metadata/media checks
prepare safe XML patch plans with backups
notes: LaunchBox stores much of its library state in XML under Data. AI can assist with audits and carefully planned edits, but LaunchBox should be closed before writes.
For a task like ensuring Japanese-developed games have English manuals, use developer/publisher metadata plus manual path/media folder checks, then ask before editing XML or copying media.
